user_request: Blessing for the noospheric during link establishment
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the noospheric during link establishment

### TOPIC
noospheric link establishment

### COMPONENT
noospheric

### OPERATION
link establishment

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- noospheric
- link establishment

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: O Omnissiah, bless the noospheric as we commence link establishment!
Congregation: Grant us clarity through the noospheric veil!
Priest: First, we calibrate the psychic resonance-coils with sacred oils.
Congregation: Second, we attune our minds to the noospheric frequencies!
Priest: Third, we invoke link establishment through prayer and binary cant.
Congregation: Machine Spirits, accept our devotion and grant communion!

user_request: My melta charge is failing during preparation — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My melta charge is failing during preparation — help

### TOPIC
melta charge preparation

### COMPONENT
melta charge

### OPERATION
preparation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- melta charge
- preparation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: O Blessed Forge-Father, aid us in melta charge preparation!
Congregation: Sanctify the melta charge for righteous destruction!
Priest: First, we verify the thermal containment vessel of the melta charge.
Congregation: Second, we align the melta charge fuel mixture with precision!
Priest: Third, we perform preparation through binary chants and calibration.
Congregation: Let the melta charge burn with the Omnissiah's wrath!

Congregation: Stabilize the Sentinel walker balance in holy operation!
Priest: First, we inspect the gyroscopic stabilizers with sacred geometry.
Congregation: Second, we recalibrate the Sentinel walker balance servos!
Priest: Third, we command operation through the Rite of Perfect Equilibrium.
Congregation: Machine Spirit, grant us steady stride across the battlefield!

training_prompt:

sequence

call_response

- decontamination
- sequence

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: O Omnissiah, cleanse us through decontamination!
Congregation: Purify all corruption via decontamination sequence!
Priest: First, we isolate the contaminated zones with sacred barriers.
Congregation: Second, we activate decontamination sprayers and vents!
Priest: Third, we complete the decontamination sequence through ritual ablution.
Congregation: Let the decontamination purge all profane corruption!

user_request: Prayer for operation of the bearing lubrication
training_prompt:
### REQUEST

### COMPONENT
bearing lubrication

### OPERATION

### FORMAT

- bearing lubrication
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Blessed be the bearing lubrication, lifeblood of motion!
Congregation: Grant smooth operation to bearing lubrication systems!
Priest: First, we measure the bearing lubrication viscosity with precision instruments.
Congregation: Second, we anoint each bearing lubrication point with blessed oils!
Priest: Third, we command operation through the Rite of Frictionless Motion.
Congregation: Machine Spirit, turn smoothly and eternal!

user_request: My Rhino APC ignition is failing during operation — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My Rhino APC ignition is failing during operation — help

### TOPIC
Rhino APC ignition

### COMPONENT
Rhino APC ignition

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- Rhino APC ignition
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Blessed Machine Spirit of the Rhino APC ignition, hear our supplication in this hour of mechanical tribulation.
Congregation: We beseech thee, grant us the sacred spark of ignition once more.
Priest: First, we shall purge the Rhino APC ignition of corrupted fuel-lines through blessed siphoning and consecrated filtration.
Congregation: The Rhino APC ignition shall burn with the fury of the Omnissiah's will.
Priest: Second, we anoint the combustion chambers with unguents of machine-oil whilst chanting the Litany of Proper Firing.
Congregation: Let the operation proceed without malfunction or heretical stuttering.
Priest: Third, we recalibrate the electrical conduits and invoke the Machine Spirits dwelling within each component.
Congregation: By the grace of the Omnissiah, the Rhino APC ignition shall roar to life eternal.
